title: The Real Time
description: This mod makes Minecraft's daily time equal to real time.
body:
_Have you ever thought that a day in Minecraft is too short? This mod will change it._

### - What did this mod do?
____________________________________________________________________________________________________
This mod makes Minecraft's day time equal to real time, but it does not extend Minecraft's daily time, it equalizes the ratio of real time in a day and the ratio of Minecraft's time to Minecraft's day.

It disabled the daylight cycle of Minecraft, and then obtained the time of the real world for each world tick, which was then converted into Minecraft's tick. So if you delete this mod, you need to use 
```
/gamerule doDaylightCycle true
```
to enable the daylight cycle.

### - What impact does this mod have on the game?
____________________________________________________________________________________________________
It's interesting that if you use this mod in the evening, You may have to survive under the attack of a large number of monsters, and you can not modify the time by any ways except by deleting this mod. It will make the survival quite difficult.

This mod is very simple, so it won't have a significant impact on performance.
